publishedAbstract: When trying to run any heketi commands, the heketi server returns with "Unknown user" or "Token missing iss claim" error: ~~~ sh-4.2# heketi-cli volume list-s http://heketi-storage-glusterfs.apps.cns.cluster.ose Error: Unknown user ~~~ ~~~ sh-4.2# heketi-cli topology info Error: Invalid JWT token: Token missing iss claim ~~~
publishedTitle: heketi-cli throws "Error: Unknown user" or "Token missing iss claim"
